subject: [PATCH v3 16/16] ioctl_userfaultfd.2: Add read-write protect mode docs

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation to the ioctl_userfaultfd man page for read-write protect mode, which is supported starting from Linux 7.2. The new features include UFFD_FEATURE_RWP and UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC capability bits, UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP registration-mode bit, and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT and UFFDIO_SET_MODE ioctls for installing and toggling read-write protection. The documentation explains how to use these new features and notes that they require Linux 7.2 or later.
